sigWerErrors.reason: The insertion of 'mươi' changes the number from 'chín một' (91) to 'chín mươi một' (91), which in Vietnamese is actually the same number, but the way it is spoken is different. However, in this context, both refer to the same phone number digit sequence, so the meaning is preserved.
